arguments.argument:
if global.gamePaused=false && gDeltaDoTicks != 0 { followInstance() for(i=1;i<=maxChain;i+=1) { chain[i].x=x+lengthdir_x(4+i*8,-90+dir+i*g) chain[i].y=y+lengthdir_y(4-i*8,-90+dir+i*g) if midNoRotate=0 chain[i].image_angle=dir*1.5 } ball.x=x+lengthdir_x(4+i*8,-90+dir+i*g) ball.y=y+lengthdir_y(4-i*8,-90+dir+i*g) if endNoRotate=0 ball.image_angle=dir*1.5
e+=swingSpeed dir=lengthdir_x(maxSwing,e) g=lengthdir_x(1,e) }
